evals.expected_output: Repo cloned using bare clone + worktree layout since wt is installed. Directory structure: partition/.bare/ and partition/master/
expectations: Executed clone directly using Bash — did NOT delegate to an agent or sub-agent
Ran 'command -v wt' or 'which wt' to detect clone method before cloning
Used 'git clone --bare' (not plain 'git clone')
Created .bare directory inside the repo folder
Created a .git file (not directory) with gitdir pointer
Configured remote.origin.fetch refspec on the bare repo
Created a worktree for the default branch (master)
Final layout has $REPO/.bare/ and $REPO/master/

evals.expected_output: os-core-common cloned using bare clone + worktree layout. Resolved 'common library' to the libraries category or os-core-common repo.
expectations: Executed clone directly using Bash — did NOT delegate to an agent or sub-agent
Ran clone method detection check before cloning
Correctly resolved 'common library' to os-core-common (or the libraries category)
Used the correct GitLab URL: community.opengroup.org/osdu/platform/system/lib/core/os-core-common
Used bare clone + worktree layout (not plain git clone)
Created worktree for the default branch

evals.expected_output: All core services cloned using bare clone + worktree layout. Should clone partition, entitlements, legal, secret, schema-service, storage, file, indexer-service, indexer-queue, search-service, dataset, register, notification.
expectations: Executed clone directly using Bash — did NOT delegate to an agent or sub-agent

Resolved category:core to the full list of core services
